scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:unit && npm run test:content
scripts.test:syntax: node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/options.js && node --check extension/x-video-bridge.js && node --check extension/x-video-observer-main.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('extension/manifest.json','utf8')); console.log('manifest ok')"
